_confidence_notes: PDF-verified against gin7manual_djvu.txt OCR (lines 1820-1962), the verbatim text layer of .omo/work/gin7manual/gin7manual.pdf.
OCR printed-page numbers run one behind the manual's stated page: 占領/防衛 results sit on OCR p38-39 (printed footer '38','39') = manual pp.39-40 region; consistent with digest §7 pp.38-40.
掃討 distance '400 ly' (400光年): OCR renders it as '400 兆 年' which is an OCR misread of 光年 (kōnen / light-years). Digest §7 line 376 confirms '400 ly'. Treated as 400 light-years.
占領/防衛 evaluated AFTER game-internal 30 days ('30日後'); 掃討 accrues DURING the 30-day window ('30日の間に'). Both confirmed verbatim in OCR.

CP cost of an operation-plan command varies by 発動予定時期 (scheduled activation timing); no numeric CP table appears on these pages — digest §10 gives an overall 10–1280 CP range. Marked _uncertain on the cost field.
Bonus point values: full = plan's base bonus; partial occupation/defense = approx 50% ('約50%'). Verbatim 'ボーナスポイント'.

operationPurposes.targetConstraint: Target system must contain ONLY other-faction-controlled planets/fortresses at the time of planning (敵星系).

operationPurposes.description: Hold one of your own systems in its current state for a fixed period.
operationPurposes.targetConstraint: Target system must contain at least 1 own-faction-controlled planet/fortress at the time of planning (自陣営の支配する惑星/要塞が最低1つ).

operationPurposes.description: Destroy/sweep enemy units present in a grid.
operationPurposes.targetConstraint: Any system may be set as the target (全ての星系が目標に設定できます), BUT this purpose can only be offered when the target is 独行艦 (lone ships).

planningEffect.description: An operation plan broadly publicizes the faction's strategic objective. Acting in accordance with the plan grants a BONUS point on top of the normal kill-merit (撃破功績) points; acting otherwise does not.

planFields.note: One of the 3 operationPurposes (占領 / 防衛 / 掃討).
Select the target system grid; allowed grids are restricted per purpose (see targetConstraint).

planFields.ja: 作戦参加艦艇ユニット数
planFields.note: Ship-unit count is capped per unit category, so in practice this decides how many fleets/units join the operation.
Decides when the plan actually activates/takes effect. The Command Point (CP) cost of the operation-plan command varies by this timing.

commandPointCost.ja: 作戦計画コマンドの要するコマンドポイント
commandPointCost.en: CP cost of one operation-plan command
commandPointCost.variesBy: 発動予定時期 (scheduled activation timing)
commandPointCost.note: No numeric CP table on pp.38-40; range sourced from digest §10.

planningRestrictions.rule: If the target system's conditions can no longer be met for any reason, the plan is automatically and immediately withdrawn and deleted (the plan itself disappears).

planningRestrictions.en: No duplicate target system per card
planningRestrictions.rule: A single job-authority card (職務権限カード) cannot issue two plans against the same target system, even if the operation purpose or activation timing differ.

planningRestrictions.ja: 有効艦艇ユニット総数の上限
planningRestrictions.rule: The sum of 作戦参加艦艇ユニット数 across ALL operations (pending + active) cannot exceed the faction's total effective ship-unit count (有効艦艇ユニット総数).
If tactical-game defeats reduce total unit count so that an already-executing plan becomes infeasible, no new operation plan can be drafted until that situation is corrected.

departmentSeparation.rule: In both Empire and Alliance, the post (department) that drafts operation plans is SEPARATE from the post that issues (発令) them.

meaningOfIssuing.rule: Issuing decides specifically WHICH units take part, based on the participating-unit count fixed by the operation plan. Units cannot be assigned to an operation whose scheduled activation timing has not yet been met.

operationStartTiming.rule: An issued operation is regarded as actually STARTED at the moment a portion of the issued units or lone ships reaches the target system. From this start point onward, actions consistent with the operation earn merit (功績) points.

duration.ja: 発令された計画の継続期間
duration.rule: An issued operation plan is regarded as ENDED once 30 game-internal days have elapsed from that point. It also ends immediately if the planner executes the 作戦撤回 (operation withdrawal) command.

operationResults.evaluationTiming: After 30 game-internal days from operation start (30日後)

outcomes.condition: All planets/fortresses in the target system brought under control.
outcomes.conditionJa: 作戦目標となっている星系内の全ての惑星/要塞を支配下にした
outcomes.bonusNote: The operation plan's original (base) bonus points go to all issued units.

outcomes.condition: At least 1 planet/fortress in the target system brought under control.
outcomes.conditionJa: 作戦目標となっている星系内の惑星/要塞を最低1つ支配下にした
outcomes.bonusNote: Approximately 50% of the base bonus goes to all issued units.

operationResults.evaluationTiming: After 30 game-internal days from operation start (30日後)

outcomes.condition: All planets/fortresses in the target system kept in own-faction state, none captured by the enemy.
outcomes.conditionJa: 星系内の全ての惑星/要塞が敵に占領されることなく自陣営の状態を維持できた
outcomes.bonusNote: The operation plan's original (base) bonus points go to all issued units.

outcomes.condition: At least 1 planet/fortress in the target system was captured by the enemy.
outcomes.conditionJa: 星系内の惑星/要塞を最低1つが敵に占領された
outcomes.bonusNote: Approximately 50% of the base bonus goes to all issued units.

operationResults.evaluationTiming: Accrues DURING the 30-day window from operation start (30日の間に)

outcomes.condition: Each enemy ship sunk within 400 light-years of the designated target system.
outcomes.conditionJa: 指定された星系から400光年以内で敵艦船を1隻撃沈するごとにボーナスポイントを得ます
outcomes.bonus: +1 bonus point per enemy ship sunk
outcomes.uncertainNote: OCR rendered 光年 (light-years) as '兆年'; value 400 ly per digest §7. Per-ship bonus increment ('+1') per digest table; OCR states 'ボーナスポイントを得ます' (gains bonus point) without the explicit numeral.
